backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Sanctuary type and CRUD operations (add, get, filter by day/month/year, get all) stored in an in-memory Map keyed by name+date.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features (multi-level progression, sword weapon, type extensions) with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their roles in the fighting game and calendar app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Calendar & Sanctuaries App' that mounts the root component via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a dark-themed layout with a header showing 'UG vs SUKUNA', the FightingGame component, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/AddSanctuaryDial: Empty file placeholder for the AddSanctuaryDialog component.
frontend/src/components/Calendar.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the Calendar component.
frontend/src/components/Character3D.tsx: React Three Fiber components rendering UG and Sukuna 3D characters, including a sword mesh, sword slash visual effect, hit flash coloring, and attack/movement animations.
frontend/src/components/FightingGame.tsx: Main fighting game component managing game state, the game loop, player/enemy creation with level-based scaling, sword mechanics, level transitions, and rendering the 3D scene and HUD.
frontend/src/components/GameHUD.tsx: Renders the in-game heads-up display showing player and enemy health bars, current level, max levels, score, and a sword-active indicator with color-coded HP bars.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/LevelTransitionS: Displays a full-screen animated level transition overlay with fade-in/hold/fade-out phases, showing the stage number, level name, and subtitle before calling onComplete.
frontend/src/components/OnScreenControls: Renders touch/mouse-friendly on-screen control buttons (move left/right, jump, punch, kick, gun, sword) that directly mutate a shared KeyState ref for mobile gameplay input.
frontend/src/components/ParticleSystem3D: Implements a Three.js instanced mesh particle system using alternating sphere (impact flare) and box (spark streak) instances, with scale-up-then-shrink animation and boosted cursed-energy color palette.
frontend/src/components/SanctuaryModal.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Scene3D.tsx: Composes the full 3D game scene including character meshes, particle system, projectiles, muzzle flashes, explosions, shockwaves, cursed energy auras, and an arena floor using React Three Fiber.
frontend/src/components/VictoryScreen.ts: Displays a full-screen victory overlay with animated decorative dots, the final score, and a replay button shown after all levels are completed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarState.ts: React hook that manages calendar view state (year/month navigation) and computes a 42-day grid of CalendarDay objects including week numbers and today highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLoop.ts: React hook that drives a requestAnimationFrame game loop, calling update with a capped deltaTime and a render function each frame, starting/stopping based on a running flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for ICP authentication via AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useKeyboardControls.t: React hook that tracks keyboard input for game controls (movement, punch, kick, block, shoot, sword) using a ref-based KeyState object updated via keydown/keyup event listeners.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all sanctuaries, fetching sanctuaries by month, and adding a sanctuary via the ICP backend actor, with nanosecond timestamp conversion utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind, defines dark-theme CSS custom properties, and adds game-specific utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the game, including Character, GameState, Particle, Projectile, KeyState, and level configuration constants for a 3-level fighting game.
frontend/src/utils/combatSystem.ts: Defines combat constants, particle spawning helpers, melee/projectile hit detection logic, and update functions for particles and projectiles each game tick.
frontend/src/utils/enemyAI.ts: Implements enemy AI state logic with configurable per-level stats, handling movement, gravity, attack cooldowns, and retreat behavior relative to the player.
frontend/src/utils/gamePhysics.ts: Provides core physics constants and functions for applying gravity, player input, arena bounds, attack hitbox calculation, and rectangle overlap detection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, oklch-based color tokens, glow box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state at version 17, summarizing a 3D fighting game (UG vs Sukuna) and listing all existing implemented features across calendar and game modules.
